description: Clear50 — 50 clear single-intent tickets across Boeing, Caterpillar, FedEx, Marriott, Pfizer, Samsung, Sony, Volkswagen, Walmart, Zoom. Security tickets prefixed 'Security incident:'. Zero overlap with Master50C and Judge suites.

cases.title: Windchill PLM checkout fails for engineering drawings
cases.description: Boeing engineer cannot check out CAD files in Windchill PLM. Server returns HTTP 503 on checkout API. Design review meeting blocked for 737 program.

cases.title: Oracle manufacturing database redo log archive full
cases.description: Oracle manufacturing database redo log archive destination full on Boeing Everett plant MES cluster. Database hangs in archiver stuck state. Shop floor scanners cannot post completions.

cases.title: Contractor badge access expired for flight line zone
cases.description: Boeing contractor badge access expired for restricted flight line zone. Turnstile denies entry at Gate 18. Contractor cannot reach assigned workstation for safety inspection.

cases.title: WAN link down between Renton and supplier portal
cases.description: WAN MPLS link down between Boeing Renton site and external supplier portal datacenter. BGP session down on edge router. Parts status feed stale for assembly line.

cases.title: Security incident: suspicious login on supplier portal admin
cases.description: Security incident: multiple failed admin logins on Boeing supplier portal from foreign IP addresses overnight. Account lockout triggered. Need SecOps triage and session revocation.

cases.title: SAP PM work order screen freeze after save
cases.description: Caterpillar field service SAP PM work order screen freezes after save. SAP GUI shows short dump in function module. Technicians cannot close completed jobs.

cases.title: SQL Server tempdb growth on parts inventory DB
cases.description: SQL Server tempdb file growth alert on Caterpillar parts inventory database. Disk at 95 percent. Nightly replenishment job failing with out-of-space error.

cases.title: New hire Active Directory account not syncing to email
cases.description: Caterpillar new hire Active Directory account created but not syncing to corporate email. User cannot receive onboarding messages. Azure AD Connect delta sync shows error.

cases.title: Plant floor Wi-Fi SSID not broadcasting in Building 7
cases.description: Plant floor Wi-Fi SSID not broadcasting in Caterpillar Building 7. Multiple APs show controller disconnected state. Handheld scanners lose connectivity to WMS.

cases.title: Security incident: malware on dealer portal web server
cases.description: Security incident: web shell detected on Caterpillar dealer portal staging server. WAF flagged unusual POST traffic. Server must be isolated and forensics started.

cases.title: Package tracking web app returns 500 on scan events
cases.description: FedEx hub package tracking web app returns HTTP 500 when loading scan events. Tomcat logs show NullPointerException in tracking service. Sort supervisors blind to misroutes.

cases.title: MongoDB shard chunk migration stuck on routing DB
cases.description: MongoDB shard chunk migration stuck on FedEx routing database. Balancer shows active migration for 6 hours. Label API latency above SLA during peak sort.

cases.title: Driver mobile app SSO token expired after device swap
cases.description: FedEx driver mobile app SSO token expired after phone device swap. Driver cannot authenticate to dispatch app. Need identity refresh and mobile SSO rebind.

cases.title: SD-WAN failover failed at Memphis hub edge
cases.description: SD-WAN failover failed at FedEx Memphis hub edge during primary circuit outage. Secondary link up but application steering policy did not switch. Hub scanners offline 12 minutes.

cases.title: Security incident: ransomware alert on file server share
cases.description: Security incident: ransomware encryption activity detected on FedEx regional file server share. EDR flagged mass file rename with suspicious extension. Isolate host immediately.

cases.title: Opera PMS room assignment screen not loading
cases.description: Marriott front desk Opera PMS room assignment screen not loading after midnight rollover. Java applet cache error on workstations. Guests waiting at check-in.

cases.title: PostgreSQL replication lag on loyalty points DB
cases.description: PostgreSQL replication lag on Marriott Bonvoy loyalty points database exceeds 30 minutes. Read replica serving stale balances to mobile app. Member complaints rising.

cases.title: Housekeeping staff shared account password reset
cases.description: Marriott property housekeeping shared floor tablet account password expired. Staff locked out of room status update app. Need service account password reset.

cases.title: Guest Wi-Fi captive portal DNS failure
cases.description: Guest Wi-Fi captive portal DNS failure at Marriott downtown property. Guests connect but redirect page does not resolve. Help desk receiving complaints.

cases.title: Security incident: credit card skimmer alert on POS terminal
cases.description: Security incident: PCI monitoring alert for possible card skimmer pattern on Marriott property POS terminal. Unusual magstripe read failures logged. SecOps must investigate and quarantine terminal.

cases.title: Veeva Vault document upload fails validation
cases.description: Pfizer clinical team Veeva Vault document upload fails metadata validation. API returns schema mismatch on batch release record. Regulatory submission deadline at risk.

cases.title: Oracle clinical trials database blocking session alert
cases.description: Oracle clinical trials database blocking session alert on Pfizer CTMS schema. Long-running lock held by ETL job. Site coordinators cannot enter patient visit data.

cases.title: Lab scientist privileged account request for LIMS
cases.description: Pfizer lab scientist needs privileged account request approved for LIMS admin role. Standard PAM ticket pending 48 hours. Batch release testing blocked.

cases.title: Site-to-site VPN down between lab and HQ
cases.description: Site-to-site IPsec VPN tunnel down between Pfizer research lab and corporate HQ. Phase 1 IKE negotiation failing after firewall rule change. Instrument data upload stopped.

cases.title: Security incident: unauthorized USB device on GxP workstation
cases.description: Security incident: unauthorized USB storage device inserted on Pfizer GxP validated workstation. DLP blocked copy attempt and raised high severity alert. Workstation quarantined.

cases.title: MES lot tracking screen shows wrong wafer map
cases.description: Samsung fab MES lot tracking screen shows wrong wafer map after engineering change. UI cache not refreshing lot genealogy. Line engineer halted lot move.

cases.title: InfluxDB disk full on equipment telemetry cluster
cases.description: InfluxDB disk full on Samsung equipment telemetry time-series cluster. Writes rejected with out of disk error. Predictive maintenance dashboards blank.

cases.title: Engineer VPN certificate renewal for cleanroom network
cases.description: Samsung engineer VPN client certificate expired for cleanroom network access. Authentication fails with certificate validation error. Need cert renewal and profile push.

cases.title: Core switch port flapping on assembly line VLAN
cases.description: Core switch port flapping on Samsung assembly line VLAN. STP reconvergence causing intermittent PLC connectivity loss. Production stoppage risk.

cases.title: Security incident: APT beacon detected on R&D server
cases.description: Security incident: APT command-and-control beacon detected on Samsung R&D file server. EDR correlated suspicious outbound DNS. Server isolated pending forensic imaging.

cases.title: Adobe Premiere render farm job queue stuck
cases.description: Sony post-production Adobe Premiere render farm job queue stuck in pending state. License server heartbeat timeout. Editors cannot export final cuts.

cases.title: MySQL slow query on royalty reporting database
cases.description: MySQL slow query alert on Sony music royalty reporting database. Full table scan on 400M row ledger. Finance report runtime exceeds 4 hour window.

cases.title: Contractor Okta account disabled before project end
cases.description: Sony contractor Okta account disabled prematurely before project end date. User cannot access Jira or Confluence. Need account re-enable and group membership restore.

cases.title: Multicast video feed packet loss in studio VLAN
cases.description: Multicast video feed packet loss in Sony studio VLAN during live production. IGMP snooping misconfiguration suspected on access switch. Director monitor shows artifacts.

cases.title: Security incident: leaked credentials on GitHub repository
cases.description: Security incident: secret scanning found production API credentials in public Sony GitHub fork. Keys must be rotated and repository access audited immediately.

cases.title: Dealer portal order configurator JavaScript error
cases.description: Volkswagen dealer portal vehicle order configurator throws JavaScript error on trim selection. Browser console shows undefined property on options API response. Sales cannot finalize orders.

cases.title: DB2 tablespace full on production BOM database
cases.description: DB2 tablespace full on Volkswagen production bill-of-materials database. Insert failures on engineering change records. Plant BOM sync halted.

cases.title: Supplier portal SAML federation certificate expired
cases.description: Volkswagen supplier portal SAML federation certificate expired. External suppliers receive authentication failure at login. Need metadata cert rollover.

cases.title: OT network segmentation blocking PLC heartbeat
cases.description: OT network segmentation change blocking PLC heartbeat traffic between Volkswagen weld shop controllers and MES. Production line yellow alarm active.

cases.title: Security incident: insider threat alert on CAD export
cases.description: Security incident: insider threat alert for bulk CAD file export from Volkswagen design share. User downloaded 2GB outside normal pattern. SecOps investigation required.

cases.title: Inventory POS price lookup API timeout
cases.description: Walmart store inventory POS price lookup API timeout on handheld devices. Service mesh shows upstream circuit open to pricing microservice. Checkout delays at peak hours.

cases.title: Cassandra repair failing on supply chain keyspace
cases.description: Cassandra node repair failing on Walmart supply chain keyspace. nodetool repair aborts with IOException. Consistency checks failing for DC transfer jobs.

cases.title: Store manager role missing in workforce scheduling app
cases.description: Walmart store manager role missing in workforce scheduling app after HR system update. Manager cannot approve shift swaps. Need RBAC role mapping fix.

cases.title: BGP route leak affecting DC internet uplink
cases.description: BGP route leak affecting Walmart distribution center internet uplink. Incorrect prefix announcement caused partial outage to vendor EDI endpoints. Edge router policy fix needed.

cases.title: Security incident: gift card fraud pattern on e-commerce
cases.description: Security incident: automated gift card fraud pattern detected on Walmart e-commerce checkout. Fraud rules flagged 400 transactions in 10 minutes. SecOps must block attack IPs.

cases.title: Admin dashboard user provisioning API 403 errors
cases.description: Zoom enterprise admin dashboard user provisioning API returns HTTP 403 for SCIM connector. OAuth scope mismatch after platform upgrade. Customer onboarding blocked.

cases.title: Redis cluster failover loop on session store
cases.description: Redis cluster failover loop on Zoom session store shard. Clients see intermittent auth failures. SRE dashboard shows repeated master election.

cases.title: Support engineer temporary admin access for tenant
cases.description: Zoom support engineer needs temporary admin access to customer tenant for outage investigation. Break-glass PAM request pending approval.

cases.title: Anycast routing blackhole on US West edge POP
cases.description: Anycast routing blackhole on Zoom US West edge POP. Latency spike and packet loss for Bay Area users joining meetings. BGP community tag misapplied.

cases.title: Security incident: Zoom bombing attack on town hall
cases.description: Security incident: Zoom bombing attack during customer town hall with offensive content shared via screen. Meeting host lost control. Need incident response and tenant hardening.
